title: blaberopus villosus
side_effects: Blaberopus villosus can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Some individuals may experience symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea after ingesting the plant. Long-term use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe side effects, including kidney damage and respiratory issues. In extreme cases, improper use of the Blaberopus villosus plant can even cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
